title: Better Beacon
description:
A mod that makes beacons in minecraft more beautiful

The normal version has purple colors, but you can change it by adding colored glass.
body:
**The normal version has purple colors, but you can change it by adding colored glass.**
**more colorful beacon for minecraft only the beacon changes** 
**purple theme beacon**
